рҹ“„ Send .json file with new items or type "cancel" for cancel. File content example: 
[
  {
    "item_type": "Physical",
    "category": "Category#1",
    "subcategory": "Subcategory#1",
    "price": 50,
    "description": "Mocked description",
    "private_data": null
  },
  {
    "item_type": "Digital",
    "category": "Category#2",
    "subcategory": "Subcategory#2",
    "price": 100,
    "description": "Mocked description",
    "private_data": "Mocked private data"
  }
]

user.faq_string: вҡ пёҸ In our store ignorance of the rules does not exempt you from responsibility. Buying at least one product in the store you automatically agree with all the rules of the store! Rules of the store вқ—1.In case of inadequate/offensive behavior the seller has the right to refuse the service! вқ—2.A replacement is provided only if the product is invalid. вқ—3.Replacement is provided only if there is a video proof. вқ—4.30 minutes warranty period. вқ—5.The administration is not responsible for any unlawful actions performed by the buyer with the items purchased in the store. вқ—6.These terms and conditions may change at any time. вқ—7.Money cannot be withdrawn from your balance.

user.referral_statistics_message: вңЁ Referral Program Invite friends and earn bonus balance inside the bot. Bonuses can be used to purchase digital and physical products. 🔓 Referral Access Your total deposits: {currency_sym}{user_total_deposits:.2f} Required to unlock referrals: {currency_sym}{min_referrer_total_deposit:.2f} Status: {referral_access_status} 🎁 What your friend gets вҖў {referral_bonus_percent}% bonus on each deposit вҖў Applies to the first {referral_bonus_deposit_limit} deposits вҖў Maximum bonus cap: {referral_bonus_cap_percent}% of their deposits 💰 What you get as a referrer вҖў {referrer_bonus_percent}% from each referral deposit вҖў Applies to the first {referrer_bonus_deposit_limit} deposits per referral вҖў Maximum bonus cap: {referrer_bonus_cap_percent}% per referral Global bonus cap: Total bonuses (you + referral) will never exceed {total_bonus_cap_percent}% of referral deposits 📊 Your Referral Stats 👥 Referrals invited: {referrals_count} 🎁 Bonuses earned as referral: {currency_sym}{referral_bonus_earned:.2f} 💰 Bonuses earned as referrer: {currency_sym}{referrer_bonus_earned:.2f}
user.referral_code_section: 🔗 Your Referral Link t.me/{bot_username}?start={referral_code} Share your link and grow together 🚀
user.top_up_balance_deposit_msg: рҹ’ө Deposit to the address the amount you want in {crypto_name} to top up the balance of bot. Payment status: {status} Payment lifetime until {payment_lifetime}. Important A unique {crypto_name} addresses is given for each deposit The top up takes place within 5 minutes after the transfer. After a successful balance refresh, you will receive a notification from bot. Your {crypto_name} address {addr}
user.top_up_balance_payment_msg: рҹ’ө Send exactly {crypto_amount} {crypto_name} вҡ пёҸ DO NOT SEND LESS. вҡ пёҸ DO NOT SEND MORE. вҡ пёҸ ONLY THE EXACT AMOUNT IS ACCEPTED. вқҢ Underpayment is forbidden. вқҢ Overpayment is forbidden. вқ— If you send any amount other than {crypto_amount} {crypto_name}, your funds will be lost permanently and cannot be recovered. Payment status: {status} вҸі Valid until: {payment_lifetime} Deposit address: {addr} в„№пёҸ This is a unique {crypto_name} address created only for this payment. вң… The balance will be credited within 5 minutes after the transaction is received.
user.top_up_balance_request_fiat: 💵 Please send the amount you wish to top up balance in {currency_text} вҡ ️ Attention! Minimal deposit amount 5 {currency_text}
user.top_up_balance_invalid_fiat_amount: вҡ пёҸ Invalid amount. Please send a positive amount from 5 to less than 1000000 {currency_text} using up to 2 decimal places.
